trace:
--- Round 1 ---
<think>The question asks about "华峰超纤" (Huafeng Superfiber) and specifically about "其他应付款" (Other Payables).

DOC1 is the 2024 Q1 Report for Shanghai Huafeng Superfiber Technology Co., Ltd. (300180), so this is the correct company.

I need to find the "其他应付款" (Other Payables) amount. This would typically be found in the Balance Sheet (资产负债表) under Liabilities (负债).

Looking at the anchor summaries:
- DOC1_A8 is "Consolidated Balance Sheet - Liabilities" which mentions "Total liabilities amount to 2,750,794,590.83 yuan. Current liabilities are 2,042,718,784.29 yuan, including short-term borrowings of 865,714,701.00 yuan and accounts payable of 435,437,728.71 yuan...."

The summary mentions accounts payable but doesn't explicitly mention "其他应付款" (Other Payables). I should open DOC1_A8 to see the full liability section and look for "其他应付款".

Let me start by opening DOC1_A8.</think>
<search>{"action":"open","anchor_id":"DOC1_A8","expected_evidence":"其他应付款的金额，在合并资产负债表的负债部分"}</search>

--- Round 2 ---
<think>I found the "其他应付款" (Other Payables) information in DOC1_A8. The table shows:

|其他应付款|239,644,736.01|308,046,220.98|

This is in the Consolidated Balance Sheet under Current Liabilities (流动负债). The first column (239,644,736.01) appears to be the current period (March 31, 2024) and the second column (308,046,220.98) appears to be the comparison period (likely end of 2023).

The question asks for "华峰超纤的其他应付款是多少" - the Other Payables amount for Huafeng Superfiber.

I have found this information. The current period value is 239,644,736.01 yuan.

Let me extract the exact verbatim text that contains this evidence.</think>
<search>{"action":"stop","reason":"found the 其他应付款 amount in the consolidated balance sheet liabilities section"}</search>
<answer>"|其他应付款|239,644,736.01|308,046,220.98|"</answer>
